name: Kunlunxin
one_liner: Baidu-spun-off AI chip subsidiary designing cloud AI accelerators. Filing for Hong Kong IPO. Projected revenue exceeding $500M.

founders.name: Ouyang Jian
founders.background: Led Kunlunxin AI chip division within Baidu before spinoff.

name: Lightelligence
one_liner: MIT-spinoff building photonic/optical AI chips claiming 100x faster inference than Nvidia GPUs. Raised $247M including $210M Series C.

founders.name: Shen Yichen
founders.background: PhD MIT Physics. Born 1989. Pioneered optical computing at MIT.

name: Moffett AI
one_liner: Sparse-computing AI inference chip designer achieving 32x performance gains by stripping unnecessary algorithmic complexity. Series B led by Ant Group.

name: Sophgo
one_liner: RISC-V processor and TPU designer spun out of Bitmain. US Entity Listed in 2024 over Huawei chip supply chain concerns.

founders.name: Micree Zhan
founders.background: Co-founder of Bitmain, world's largest Bitcoin mining chip maker.

name: Inceptio Technology
one_liner: Autonomous trucking company mass-producing L3 self-driving heavy-duty trucks with OEM partners Dongfeng and Sinotruk.

founders.name: Julian Ma (Ma Zheren)
founders.background: MBA from IMD. BS EE from Shanghai Jiaotong University. Former Corporate VP at Tencent overseeing strategy and autonomous driving. Former board member of NIO and ZOOX.

name: AutoX
one_liner: Developer of L4+ fully driverless robotaxi platform operating the largest driverless fleet in Asia (1,000+ vehicles).

founders.name: Jianxiong Xiao (Professor X)
founders.background: Former Princeton University professor. PhD from MIT. Specializes in computer vision, 3D deep learning, and autonomous driving.

name: Earendil Labs
one_liner: AI-powered biologics discovery company with 40+ pipeline programs for autoimmune diseases and cancer. Backed by Sanofi and Pfizer.

founders.name: Jian Peng
founders.background: PhD from Hunan University. Former Associate Professor at UIUC.

founders.name: Zhenping Zhu
founders.background: MD from Jiangxi Medical College. PhD immunology from Dalhousie University. Former Global VP Protein Sciences at Novartis.

name: DP Technology
one_liner: AI-for-Science platform accelerating drug discovery, materials research, and battery design through molecular simulation.

founders.name: Weinan E
founders.background: Professor at Peking University and Princeton. Member of Chinese Academy of Sciences. World-renowned mathematician.

founders.name: Linfeng Zhang
founders.background: BS Peking University, PhD Applied Mathematics Princeton. Director of AI for Science Institute.

name: Moka HR
one_liner: AI-powered HR/recruitment SaaS platform (China's Workday equivalent) for enterprises with 500+ employees. Unicorn at $1B+.

founders.name: Zhao Oulun (Orion)
founders.background: UC Berkeley graduate. Former engineer at Turo (SF).

founders.name: Li Guoxing
founders.background: University of Michigan and Stanford graduate. Former Facebook engineer.

name: Axiom Math
one_liner: AI startup building mathematical superintelligence — systems that solve complex math, generate conjectures, and produce formally verified proofs. Valued at $1.6B.

founders.name: Carina Hong
founders.background: Born in Guangzhou. MIT dual-degree math + physics. Rhodes Scholar (China). Knight-Hennessy Scholar at Stanford. Won Morgan Prize for Outstanding Research in Mathematics.
